nws.name: Overnight
nws.detailedForecast: A slight chance of rain showers before 2am, then patchy smoke. Mostly clear. Low around 58, with temperatures rising to around 60 overnight. West southwest wind around 7 mph. Chance of precipitation is 20%.

nws.name: Friday
nws.detailedForecast: Patchy smoke before noon. Sunny. High near 93, with temperatures falling to around 91 in the afternoon. North wind 5 to 8 mph, with gusts as high as 17 mph.

nws.name: Friday Night
nws.detailedForecast: Partly cloudy. Low around 59, with temperatures rising to around 62 overnight. North northwest wind 5 to 12 mph, with gusts as high as 18 mph.

nws.name: Independence Day
nws.shortForecast: Mostly Sunny then Chance Showers And Thunderstorms
nws.detailedForecast: A chance of showers and thunderstorms after 3pm. Mostly sunny, with a high near 90. East wind 3 to 9 mph, with gusts as high as 18 mph. Chance of precipitation is 30%.

nws.name: Saturday Night
nws.detailedForecast: Partly cloudy, with a low around 59. Southeast wind 6 to 10 mph, with gusts as high as 18 mph.

nws.name: Sunday
